author: saml-dev
description: Reuse custom JavaScript across desktop and mobile.

manifest.author: Sam Lewis
manifest.description: This plugin lets you use custom javascript files inside your vault.
manifest.name: CustomJS

name: CustomJS

releases.author: saml-dev
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Call deconstructors on plugin unload by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/89
* Update README.md to mention singleton classes by @baweaver in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/91

## New Contributors
* @baweaver made their first contribution in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/91

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/compare/1.0.20...1.0.21

releases.author: saml-dev
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Import obsidian module by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/53
* Fix typescript ignores by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/55
* Add commands to invoke custom scripts by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/57
* Add startup scripts by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/56
* Cleanup code by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/59
* Enable debugging by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/saml-dev/obsidian-custom-js/pull/61

## New Contributors

Fix

releases.description:

🤷‍♂️ Rename classes for CustomJS

releases.author: saml-dev
releases.description:
## Fixes
🐛 Use `registerEvent` to ensure proper cleanup — aka avoid memory leaks

releases.author: saml-dev
releases.description:
Features:
✅ Monitor loaded JS files for changes
✅ Moved customJS object to global for simpler usage throughout Obsidian `const { Example } = customJS`

releases.author: saml-dev
releases.description:
## Features
✅ Write custom classes
✅ Works on desktop and mobile
✅ Available wherever Obsidian `app` or `plugins` is available
